name: Mortar material with no trigger in damage/schedule
description: Pre-baked Sonnet analysis contains a 'lime mortar' material line but neither damageDescription nor scheduleOfWorks mentions mortar joints, mortared bed/cope, or repointing. The critique prompt's rule #12 requires this to be flagged with a recommendation to remove — dry stone walling is dry-laid by default, so the customer should not be charged for material the job does not need.
briefNotes: Six-metre stretch of double-faced gritstone field wall has collapsed after heavy rain. Stone is scattered at the base, mostly reclaimable. Access via field gate, no scaffold needed.

analysis.damageDescription: A 6m breach has opened up in this double-faced gritstone field wall, with stones scattered at the base. The standing sections either side appear sound but will need taking back 300mm to provide a stable rebuild abutment. No through stones are visible in the collapsed material.

labourEstimate.calculationBasis: 6 sqm wall face at ~1 sqm/hour each, 2 wallers, 3 days

scheduleOfWorks.title: Site clearance
scheduleOfWorks.description: Clear debris and sort reclaimable stone

scheduleOfWorks.title: Take back abutments
scheduleOfWorks.description: Take standing sections back 300mm to provide stable rebuild edges

scheduleOfWorks.title: Rebuild
scheduleOfWorks.description: Rebuild the 6m breach double-faced with through stones every 600-900mm of height

scheduleOfWorks.title: Cope and finish
scheduleOfWorks.description: Set coping stones and tidy site
